detectors.description:
Reentrancy in SIXXVault._recallFromAdapter(uint256) (src/core/SIXXVault.sol#248-267):
	External call allowing reentrancy:
	- IStrategyAdapter(activeAdapter).withdraw(toWithdraw,address(this)) (src/core/SIXXVault.sol#263)
	Balance read before the call:
	- idle = IERC20(asset()).balanceOf(address(this)) (src/core/SIXXVault.sol#249)
	Possible stale balance used after the call in a condition:
	- require(bool,string)(received >= toWithdraw,VAULT: adapter shortfall) (src/core/SIXXVault.sol#265)
		- stale variable `toWithdraw`

detectors.description:
SIXXVault.collectFees() (src/core/SIXXVault.sol#346-373) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- feeAssets = (assets * managementFee * elapsed) / (MAX_BPS * SECS_PER_YEAR) (src/core/SIXXVault.sol#360)
	- feeShares = (feeAssets * supply) / (assets - feeAssets) (src/core/SIXXVault.sol#366)
